business.name: Moss Tree Service, LLC
business.tagline: We show up when trees come down

hero.headline: Trees down? *We're already* on the way
hero.subheadline: Charleston's crew that shows up in snowstorms and cleans up like we were never there.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every tree, every situation
services_section.subheading: From routine trimming to storm cleanup — one call handles it all

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Dangerous trees, fallen trees, trees too close to your house. Gone without a trace.

services.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.description: Keep your trees healthy and your property safe. Professional cuts that promote growth.

services.title: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.description: Ice storms, wind damage, emergency situations. We work through the weather to clear your property.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete removal down to the roots. Your yard back to normal, ready for whatever comes next.

about.heading: Charleston tree crew that shows up
about.body: We're the team Charleston calls when trees need to go. Licensed, insured, and equipped for everything from routine trimming to storm emergencies.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Removed a large pine — arrived when they said, did spectacular work, completely cleaned up. Very professional, would be my first choice again.

reviews.name: Melissa T.
reviews.text: Had a cracked tree threatening my garage. Jimmy gave a reasonable estimate, job was done professionally and cleanly.

reviews.name: Tyler H.
reviews.text: Ice storm damage — they came out during the snowstorm, fair quote, started as soon as the weather cleared. Excellent work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local crew covering the greater Charleston region

cta.heading: Ready to clear those trees?
cta.body: Free estimates, fair pricing, and cleanup so thorough you'll forget we were there. Call the crew Charleston trusts.
